mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_BOARD WHERE BRD_SEQ = #{brdSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (BRD_TYPE, CATEGORY, IS_NOTICE, TITLE, CONTENT, YOUTUBE_URL, REG_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{brdType}, #{category}, #{isNotice}, #{title}, #{content}, #{youtubeUrl}, #{regId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD SET CATEGORY = #{category}, IS_NOTICE = #{isNotice}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, YOUTUBE_URL = #{youtubeUrl}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE BRD_SEQ = #{brdSeq}
UPDATE TB_BOARD SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE BRD_SEQ = #{brdSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FILE ( REF_TABLE, REF_SEQ, ORG_FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DT, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{refTable}, #{refSeq}, #{orgFileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, NOW(), 'N' )
